body_transformation: The rounded head's mushroom cap transforms into a jagged, electric-blue spiny crown with neon-green circuit patterns tracing its ridges, while the pink body adopts a sleek, wiry texture with vibrant yellow streaks along its limbs. White spots fade into glowing neon-green circuit motifs on the head, and the curled tail tip now crackles with electric-blue sparks. Dark blue accents shift to sharp, angular lightning-bolt patterns along the legs, maintaining the compact silhouette with a leaner frame. The stubby legs now feature sparking fur tips and angular, circuit-like textures instead of soft padding.
signature_feature: Spiny crown: jagged electric-blue spines with neon-green circuit patterns and crackling energy.
